name: Platformer Saver
description: Unlimited checkpoint save history for platformer levels — auto-save on every checkpoint, pause-menu timeline, branch or truncate loads, stats, rewind, and export/import.

show-save-notifications.name: Save notifications (legacy)
show-save-notifications.description: Migrated to split auto/manual notification settings.

show-autosave-notifications.name: Auto-save notifications
show-autosave-notifications.description: Show a notification when a checkpoint is auto-saved.

show-manual-save-notifications.name: Manual save notifications
show-manual-save-notifications.description: Show notifications for manual saves and loads.

show-continue-notification.name: Continue notification
show-continue-notification.description: Show a notification when auto-continuing from your latest save.

play-save-sounds.name: Save/load sounds
play-save-sounds.description: Play a sound effect on successful save or load.

auto-save.name: Auto-save checkpoints
auto-save.description: Automatically save when touching a platformer checkpoint.

entry-behavior.name: Level entry behavior
entry-behavior.description: Auto-continue from latest save, or ask with Continue / New game menu.

load-behavior.name: Load behavior
load-behavior.description: Truncate newer saves when loading an older save, or fork a new branch.

max-history-entries.name: Max history entries
max-history-entries.description: Maximum save history entries per level (0 = unlimited).

rewind-depth.name: Rewind depth
rewind-depth.description: How many history slots to rewind (1–3).

speedrun-mode.name: Speedrun mode
speedrun-mode.description: Disable manual save; auto-saves use a separate speedrun branch and load menu filter.

confirm-load-truncate.name: Confirm load truncate
confirm-load-truncate.description: Ask for confirmation before deleting newer saves when loading an older save.

save-history-sort.name: Newest saves first
save-history-sort.description: Show the newest saves at the top of the load history menu.

level-version-warning.name: Updated level version warning
level-version-warning.description: Show a warning when opening a save file that was updated from a previous version of the level.

psf-version-warning.name: Updated save file warning
psf-version-warning.description: Show a warning when opening a save file that was updated from a previous Platformer Saver version.

rewind-checkpoint.name: Rewind checkpoint
rewind-checkpoint.description: Load a previous save from history (Platformer Saver)
